title: diospyros scabrida
intro: Diospyros scabrida, also known as the rough leatherwood or rough persimmon, is a species of plant in the family Ebenaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Diospyros scabrida is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving pain, and may also have anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and has been used in traditional medicine in various forms, including dried leaves and roots.
